title: @bartoldson: I second the suggestion to learn about async RL by using prime-RL, their code is...
rawContent:
Tweet by @bartoldson (Brian Bartoldson)
Author bio: ML researcher
Text: I second the suggestion to learn about async RL by using prime-RL, their code is very clear and hackable.

But if you prefer to learn about async RL for LLMs via papers, I recommend these early ones: 
- https://t.co/7lx15EIDar
- https://t.co/JTVTWuU2P5

https://t.co/7A7arVaxHR https://t.co/E7Rbf1J56U
